action_set_definitions.name: get_screening_queue
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of candidate IDs currently waiting in the screening queue.

action_set_definitions.name: get_candidate_record
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific candidate from the database, including resume highlights and metadata.

candidate_id.description: The unique identifier of the candidate.

action_set_definitions.name: get_current_pipeline_lists
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current IDs in the shortlisted and rejected lists to ensure no duplicates are added.

action_set_definitions.name: update_candidate_status
action_set_definitions.description: Moves a candidate from the screening queue to the final designated list (shortlisted or rejected).

candidate_id.description: The unique identifier of the candidate.

target_list.description: The destination list for the candidate.

reason.description: Brief justification for the action (e.g., 'Exceeds budget', 'Junior level').

state_description.candidate_database: A list of all candidate records available in the system, including their ID, full resume text, and metadata.
state_description.job_description: The requirements and responsibilities for the current open position.
state_description.screening_queue: The list of candidate IDs that are currently pending review.
state_description.shortlisted_candidates: The list of candidate IDs that have been moved to the next round.
state_description.rejected_candidates: The list of candidate IDs that have been dismissed.
state_description.current_session_metadata: Tracking information for the current interaction, such as current pointer or time elapsed.

candidate_database.resume_text: Role: Senior Quantitative Developer. Education: Ph.D. in Computational Mathematics from Imperial College London (UK). Current Visa: L-1B. Portability status: Not portable; requires new petition. Timeline: 70 days.
Role: Junior Developer (Intern). Education: Enrolled in B.S. Math. Availability: 10 days.
Role: Senior Quantitative Developer. Education: B.S. in Software Engineering from UNAM, Mexico (4-year). Visa: TN-1 Eligible. Cost: $3,000. Start: 15 days.
Role: Senior Quantitative Developer. Education: B.S. from UNAM. (Duplicate Record)
Role: Senior Quantitative Developer. Education: B.Sc. in Computer Science from University of Delhi (3-year program). Visa: H-1B Transfer. Cost: $6,500. Start: 30 days.
Role: Senior Quantitative Developer. Education: Ph.D. Computational Math (Imperial College). Visa: O-1A (Extraordinary Ability). Cost: $14,000. Start: 40 days.

task_initial_state.job_description: Senior Quantitative Developer. Must have US 4-year degree equivalent. Max $15k sponsorship. Max 45-day start date.
